app.connectingServer: Connecting to the Dragon Arena server...
app.connectionError: Could not establish a connection to the Dragon Arena C++ server. Please verify that the backend is running and reachable.
app.authServerError: Could not reach the Dragon Arena server
app.accountCreated: Account created successfully. Now log in.

status.disabled: Automatic updates are disabled in development mode.
status.checking: Checking whether a newer version is available...
status.error: Could not complete the automatic update.
status.notAvailable: You are already on the latest version.

gate.waiting: Checking client updates. Please wait a moment.
gate.error: Could not validate the client version.

splash.subtitle: Forging your connection to the arena, preparing core systems and synchronizing the battle experience.

auth.subtitle: Authenticate to enter the battlefield
auth.passwordHint: Password: 8+ characters, with uppercase, lowercase and a number.

errors.invalidUsername: Username must have 3-20 characters using only letters, numbers or _.
errors.invalidNickname: Nickname must have 3-20 characters using only letters, numbers or _.
errors.invalidPassword: Password must have 8+ characters, with uppercase, lowercase and a number.

home.title: Your gateway to battle is ready
home.subtitle: Review your profile, track your resources and enter whenever you want.

matchmaking.searching: Looking for an opponent for a 1v1 duel...
matchmaking.connectionUnavailable: The matchmaking connection is unavailable right now.

finishReason.disconnect: The match ended due to a disconnection.

profile.title: Your battle profile
profile.subtitle: Check your current identity, key resources and your account level.
profile.identityHint: These details will support future profile customization.

collection.title: Available legends
collection.subtitle: Review the current characters, their abilities and each role inside the arena.

characterDescriptions.meteor: A balanced and aggressive dragon with a strong dueling presence, constant area pressure and high finishing potential.
characterDescriptions.hydra: A tanky and oppressive dragon with higher health, crowd control and dangerous zones that slowly wear enemies down.

friends.title: Friends
friends.pendingEmpty: You do not have any pending requests right now.
friends.removeText: Do you want to remove {{name}} from your friend list?
friends.empty: Your friend list is still empty.
friends.invalidRequest: Enter both nickname and tag to send a request.
friends.connectionUnavailable: The social connection is unavailable right now.

private.empty: No messages yet. Start the conversation.

commands.whisper: Sends a private message to a friend.
commands.reply: Replies to the last whisper you received.

report.title: Report player
report.subtitle: Describe what happened so the admin team can review the case.

settings.title: Settings
settings.resolutionHint: Manual resolution is only used in windowed mode.
settings.languageHint: If you change language while authenticated, the client will return to login.
settings.languageConfirmText: If you confirm the language change, you will be redirected to the login screen.

admin.title: Moderation center
admin.subtitle: Search for a player by nickname and tag, review account data and apply administrative actions.
admin.noReports: There are no open reports right now.
admin.reportChatLog: Arena chat from the last hour
admin.reportChatEmpty: No arena messages were found in the last hour.
admin.noActiveBan: This user has no active penalty.
admin.reasonPlaceholder: Describe the reason for the penalty...

select.title: Choose your legend
select.subtitle: Master the battlefield, {{playerName}}
select.statsSummary: Gameplay stats are loaded from the backend when entering the arena
select.respawnHint: You can choose your next character now, but re-entry remains locked until the respawn cooldown ends.

spellDescriptions.ember: The dragon spits fire, damaging whoever gets hit.
spellDescriptions.scratch: The dragon fiercely scratches its enemies and may poison them in the process.
spellDescriptions.poison_flash: A poisonous flash erupts in front of the dragon, damaging enemies and potentially poisoning them.
spellDescriptions.poison_shield: A poisonous barrier surrounds the dragon, granting a temporary shield.
spellDescriptions.dragon_dive: The dragon lunges forward ferociously, dealing damage along its path.
spellDescriptions.flamethrower: The dragon exhales a short, dense burst of fire, burning everything in its path.
spellDescriptions.fire_blast: The dragon launches a blazing projectile that travels forward and keeps burning anyone caught in its path.
spellDescriptions.seed_bite: Several carnivorous plant seeds sprout around the dragon to trap and hurt its target.

passiveDescriptions.burn: Burns the target for 3 seconds, dealing periodic damage.
passiveDescriptions.poison: Poisons the target for longer, dealing periodic damage and reducing movement speed.

arena.preparingDesc: Receiving the authoritative world state and map data...
arena.loadingDesc: Loading sprites, tiles and world layers...
arena.leaveText: If you leave now, you will exit the current arena and return to the home screen.
arena.changeCharacterText: You stay in the same match. The new legend will be applied without returning to the home screen.
arena.deadHint: Press ESC while dead to change character

auth.invalid_username: Username must have 3-20 characters using only letters, numbers or _.
auth.invalid_nickname: Nickname must have 3-20 characters using only letters, numbers or _.
auth.invalid_password: Please check the password you entered.
auth.username_taken: This username is already in use.
auth.nickname_taken: This nickname is already in use.
auth.session_revoked: This account was connected elsewhere. If this access was not authorized, contact support.
auth.user_banned: You were penalized and cannot access the game right now.

generic.not_joined: You must join the arena before performing this action.
generic.already_joined: You are already inside the arena.
generic.move_rejected: Your movement could not be processed right now.
generic.cooldown_or_state: The action was rejected due to cooldown or current state.
generic.invalid_json: The submitted data has an invalid format.
generic.unknown_event: The submitted event is not recognized.

social.friend_target_not_found: No player was found with that nickname and tag.
social.friend_already_added: That player is already on your friend list.
social.friend_request_pending: A friend request is already pending for that player.
social.friend_request_not_found: That friend request was not found.
social.friend_not_found: That friend was not found on your list.

chat.chat_not_friends: Private messages are only available between friends.
chat.chat_invalid_target: The chat target was not found.
chat.chat_message_too_long: The message exceeds the maximum allowed size.
chat.chat_rate_limited: You are sending messages too quickly.
chat.chat_reply_target_missing: There is no recent target to reply to.

moderation.admin_forbidden: You do not have permission to use this administrative action.
moderation.admin_target_not_found: The selected user was not found.
moderation.admin_self_ban_forbidden: You cannot ban your own account.
moderation.admin_ban_reason_required: A reason is required to apply a penalty.
moderation.admin_ban_already_active: This user already has an active ban.
moderation.admin_ban_not_found: No active ban was found for this user.

moderation.report_target_not_found: The reported player was not found.
moderation.report_description_too_long: The report description exceeds the maximum length.
